name: Double Chocolate Brownies-2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Butter a 9" x 13-inch baking dish.
3. Melt together the chocolate squares and chips, and the butter.
4. Cool.
5. Beat together eggs, sugar, and vanilla extract in a large bowl until well combined.
6. Beat in the melted chocolate mixture.
7. Mix flour, salt, and baking powder.
8. Stir the dry ingredients into the batter until just combined.
9. Add marshmallows and chopped walnuts.
10. Pour the batter into the prepared baking dish.
11. Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until set but still slightly soft in the center.
12. Let the brownies cool completely before cutting into squares.
13. Enjoy!
